NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR, ENTIRE ACTION DISMISSED ON DECEMBER 11, 2007. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Protective Order And To Quash Deposition Subpoenas
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Blane Marie Mall, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Nancy Wold
Court Reporter: Sara Lucia Brann, CSR# 3887

No other appearance stated, after hearing tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Nancy Wold's motion for a protective order is granted in part. The subpoenas are modified to only require production of records from January 21, 2000 relating to back problems, instance of or conditions contributing to chronic pain, and any serious psychological conditions. The parties shall meet and confer as to entering into a stipulated protective order that prohibits the disclosure or dissemination of any records for purposes unrelated to the litigation.
Compliance by August 31, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
